name: field
description: The FormField + FieldError orchestration: a label + control + description/error wrapper that auto-derives the accessible wiring (aria-invalid, the description/error ids the control points its aria-describedby at, the destructive label cue) from the per-field error, the server-first analogue of shadcn's FormControl/FormMessage. Supports vertical/horizontal/responsive orientation and a FieldContent slot. Ships the FieldGroup, FieldSet/FieldLegend and FieldSeparator child partials.
docs: Copies the field partial (+ its field/group, field/set and field/separator children) to your JTE root at lievit/field.jte, reached as @template.lievit.field(forId=..., label=..., error=..., control=@`...`). The error/description ids are deterministic from forId (`<forId>-error`, `<forId>-description`); set the control's aria-describedby to the space-joined present ids and its invalid flag to (error != null) so the message is announced. Group fields with @template.lievit.field.group / field.set; divide them with field.separator. The source is yours: edit freely.
